results.title: John Cleese makes end of life admission: ‘Never expected to last this long’
results.description: The Monty Python legend announced some major career news.

results.title: Shilpa Shinde False Sexual Harassment Row EXPLAINED: Why Did Bhabiji Ghar Par Hain Actress Accuse Producer
results.description: In her latest podcast, Shilpa Shinde confessed that she levelled false sexual harassment charges against the producer of Bhabiji Ghar Par Hain, Sanjay Kohli. The matter was settled in 2018.
